case_title: JUNONA J JONES EXECUTOR OF RICHARD DARRINGTON vs. WARFEL, CHARLES et al

docket_entries.description: #7 SING/YEE: CC FOR TRIAL W/O JURY. ALL PRESENT. COURT & COUNSEL IN CHAMBERS IN PRE-TRIAL SETT & HRG. MOT TO EXCLUDE GRANTED. OP STMT BY PLT, OP STMT RESERVED BY DEFT. ORAL & WRITTEN TESTIMONY TAKEN. EVID ACCEPTED. CONT'D TO 10 AM SEP 28, 1993 FOR FURTHER TRIAL.

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WARFEL, CHARLES

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JUNONA J JONES EXECUTOR OF RICHARD DARRINGTON SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-20-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON SEP-27-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 07 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
CT TRIAL RESUMES. ALL PRESNT. MORE ORAL AND WRIT TESTIMONY TAKEN. CONT'D TO 10 AM SEP 29, '93
CT TRIAL CONT'D. ALL PRESENT. MOTIONS MADE. NEGOTIATED SETTLEMENT BETWEEN PARTIES. JUD IN FAV OF PLT AG DEFT FOR POSS OF 63 EUREKA ST, SF. S/E TO OCT 12 1993.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WARFEL, CHARLES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 63 EUREKA ST, SF 94114, STAYED UNTIL OCT-12-1993, LEASE FORFEITED
